name: telegram-codex-bridge
description: Self-hosted Telegram bridge for Codex app-server with GUI-like continuity, account failover, and group-safe controls

scripts.test: node -c index.js && node --test ./tests/*.test.js && zsh -n ./scripts/codex-launch-supervisor.sh && zsh -n ./scripts/install-launch-agent.sh && zsh -n ./scripts/uninstall-launch-agent.sh

author: sharenla
